title: JSON Schema metaschema invalidity
affected_surfaces: Derived machine-readable projections and release envelope
repair_summary: Four schemas contained string-valued property schemas and six unescaped $ref spaces. Schemas normalized to valid Draft 2020-12 shapes; references URI-escaped.

title: Reference-index non-closure
affected_surfaces: Derived machine-readable projections and release envelope
repair_summary: 153 declared references did not resolve. Missing historical projections restored; ambiguous node and test selectors made exact.

title: Validation contract split
affected_surfaces: Derived machine-readable projections and release envelope
repair_summary: Validation specification and receipt schema described different check sets. One check catalog now drives both specification and receipt schema.

title: Four test-binding identifier mismatches
affected_surfaces: Derived machine-readable projections and release envelope
repair_summary: Bindings used underscore or obsolete aliases absent from registry. Bindings point to canonical test identifiers.

title: No declared AI-human-memory substrate profile
affected_surfaces: Derived machine-readable projections and release envelope
repair_summary: Core was substrate-aware but package lacked a complete runtime declaration for this target. Canonical runtime profile and machine projection added.

title: Foundation classes and dependencies not explicit enough
affected_surfaces: Derived machine-readable projections and release envelope
repair_summary: Axiom, postulate, condition, theorem, norm and hypothesis remained distributed. Foundation classification and dependency DAG added without changing normative formulations.

title: Development provenance not packaged
affected_surfaces: Derived machine-readable projections and release envelope
repair_summary: Relevant dialogue history was available but not represented as bounded evidence. BOIS-only milestone projection and theory/practice map added.

title: Two-archive bootstrap no longer matches requested release transport
affected_surfaces: Derived machine-readable projections and release envelope
repair_summary: Prior package required split transport. Single passive-data archive envelope introduced while retaining normative v2.22 identity.

title: Registry tests declared but no execution receipt
affected_surfaces: Derived machine-readable projections and release envelope
repair_summary: 1,392 declarative tests were marked NOT_RUN. Static contract runner executed all registry entries and emitted per-test evidence.

title: Profile derivation references targeted undeclared PDF destinations
repair_summary: Nine profile nodes referenced PDF named destinations that do not exist. Canonical references now point to the exact profile records in the behavior-profile projection.

title: Historical v2.21 finding migration entries were absent
repair_summary: Nine declared MIG-222-FINDING identifiers had no rows. A dedicated passive migration projection now preserves each v2.21 finding-to-v2.22 repair transition.

title: Repair validation checks were typed as registry tests in reference reconstruction
repair_summary: Thirty-seven CHECK-F identifiers in regression and closure columns are now resolved as validation check identifiers rather than test-registry identifiers.
